project_area: Programs benefiting New Hampshire women and girls, including economic security, health/wellness/safety, and leadership/education/empowerment
demographic_requirements: Programs must address the root causes of problems faced by New Hampshire women and girls, challenge systemic barriers, promote empowerment/leadership, and demonstrate collaboration among women’s and girls’ organizations
eligibility_summary: Open to organizations in New Hampshire that advance gender equity through programs addressing economic security, health/wellness/safety, leadership/education/empowerment, or policy impact for women and girls.
